disclaimer: gemini ai trans

**Aoftionz Live Summary**

 * **The other day, I asked NongZon (kaijeng) if he was tired.** He replied, “I haven't even started working today,” so I didn't know what to ask next. 😂

 * **NuNew’s solo concert is in the plans**, but I really can't spoil anything right now. It will definitely happen within this year. The NuNew brand will not disappoint anyone. Once it's announced, I want everyone to come.

 * **The Sports Day event** will feature both sports competitions and special shows.

 * **I really like Zee with short hair.** Just the other day, I complimented him, saying he looks younger.

 * **For #ZeeNuNewTheReality,** we want you to see sides of them that no one has ever seen before. It has to be truly real.

 * **Regarding the lightstick price:** I don't want people to compare it with Korean groups because they produce in massive quantities at a time, and normally, the higher the production volume, the cheaper the cost per unit.

 * **For all artists, Fashion Week invitations** usually come in quite last-minute. If an existing schedule can be shifted around, we will do it so the kids can attend. But if we already accepted another job beforehand, we have to fulfill that responsibility. (We also have to look at their schedules and the artists' own preferences, because they might want to focus on other work during that period).

 * **I acknowledge the feedback regarding "recasting/changing actors,"** but I cannot speak about it here.

 * **Feedback has already been sent** regarding the response times/customer service of the DMD Shop.

 * *Mon Rak Hug E-Lee* (Isan Love Spell) should be something brand new for the industry. I'm excited about it too. It's definitely going to be *muan* (fun/entertaining).

 * **I constantly teach the kids to prioritize manners and respectfulness** (being quick to *wai* and show respect), as it makes them look more endearing. During artist interviews/auditions, we look at their attitude toward fans. We regularly talk with the younger artists to keep ourselves updated and find a middle ground that suits the younger generation today.

 * **DMD's current content is highly diverse.** We want everyone to have options that fit their preferences. We are trying to experiment with new things. (I'd prefer if people didn't use the word "Cringe" so carelessly, as it might cause some people to lose confidence. Some things might just be down to personal preference).

 * **The *The Next Prince* (Khon Fah Kiang Ther) Boxset** might have a few scenes slightly re-edited.

 * **Regarding the benefit compensation,** I've already informed the team to announce it as soon as everything is finalized.

 * **Squishies?** There will (probably) be some. I want you to wait and see.

 * **Engagement from all parties is important**—whether it's from the artists, the staff, or the fans.

 * **For the Domundi Cafe,** I really want to collab with Pokémon. My life would truly be complete.

🤍🤍🤍🤍🤍🤍🤍🤍🤍🤍🤍🤍

 **#P'Aof's Message to Us:**
> "I want everyone to play on X (Twitter) happily. If there's something you can overlook, you should just let it go. Follow your artists mindfully and remember why you started following them in the first place... I'm truly worried about everyone. I don't want you to read certain things and end up feeling discouraged. I really don't want it to be like that."
> 
🤍🤍🤍🤍🤍🤍🤍🤍🤍🤍🤍🤍

AI app ideas are cheap. Launchable templates are the bottleneck.

Awesome Generative AI Apps is a curated GitHub repo of 50+ open-source generative AI app templates for builders who want to clone, deploy, and adapt AI SaaS products.

It helps you skip the blank Next.js project by grouping templates for image, video, beauty/fashion, e-commerce, writing, agents, audio, and integrations, with setup and deploy paths already documented.

Key features:

• 50+ app templates – cloneable products across image generation, video generation, virtual try-on, product photography, content, agents, and more
• SaaS plumbing included – README highlights Stripe billing, Google OAuth, Prisma/PostgreSQL, credit balances, and job history
• Vercel deployment path – templates point to Deploy to Vercel buttons and a quick-start flow
• Category navigation – table of contents lets you scan by use case instead of hunting through random demos
• MIT license – repo metadata and README both mark it as MIT licensed for reuse and adaptation

It’s open-source (MIT license).

Link in the reply 👇

🌸 Alpha - Fragments of Growth

A decade of travel, memories, and textures - now brought on-chain.

Created by fashion photographer and visual artist Jenya Vyguzov, the collection transforms textures captured across years of travel into handcrafted collage flowers , each petal representing a place, memory, or moment. No AI, no generative outputs, every piece is individually composed by hand.

What stands out here is the artist behind it. Jenya has spent over a decade working with brands like Vogue, GQ Style, Tatler, Elle, Puma, and IKEA, while building a distinctive visual language. His work was even selected for the official Paris Prints Textile Show poster, where he was given an entire floor for a solo exhibition.

⚠️WL applications are coming soon. If you're interested in art NFTs, this is the stage where you want to be paying attention. Follow the artist and the project, turn on notifications, and be ready when WL applications open.

🔎 Mint Details TBA
